title: Expand platform-spec pages and doc feedback guides

source.subject: docs(site): expand platform-spec pages and doc feedback guides

body:
## Outcome

Expand platform-spec pages and doc feedback guides.

## Context

- Workstream **platform-spec** — normative spec on beskid-lang.org.
- Normative updates live under `site/website/src/content/docs/platform-spec/` and ship via beskid-lang.org.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`d25aa7a`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/d25aa7a) — docs(site): expand platform-spec pages and doc feedback guides
